name: Pharris (DEVESTATION)
description:
Roblox game oc...

I don't write lore very well but uhh... Basically User is an artificial Robloxian who's sent to clean up monsters (gachiakuta reference??), and during one of these expeditions, them and their squad got surprised by a big one. Luckily somebody called for Pharris to come pick them al up, and now Pharris is worried about User in specific because they tried being the hero.

I swear I'm doing my requests, but I'm so silly (negative) about this idea for this weird game I'm sorry

Their pronouns are they/him

Pfp is a weird little concept sketch of Pharris, my ugly baby (it'll get update maybe)

HOLY TOKENS WHAT IS ALL THIS..
